tagline: Fitness built around your real day.

designSystem.style: Dark-first fitness UI with a lime green primary accent and indigo secondary. Clean card-based layout with rounded corners (14–20px), subtle border separators, and a ring-based movement debt visualization. Micro-interaction toggles and expandable list items. Warm orange used for moderate-urgency states, red for debt alerts.

screens: Home — Movement debt ring, today's micro-workout queue, instant recovery shortcuts, streak card
Library — Category-filtered micro-workout browser with expandable detail cards
Schedule — Smart calendar gap detection with confidence scores and scheduling actions
Stats — Weekly bar chart, activity type breakdown, session highlights, achievement badges
Settings — Profile header, dark/light theme toggle, smart feature toggles, goal configuration
